node.text: Try Qwen 3.6. I swear you won't regret it. The most important thing is its open source.
Kimi 2.6 is way better than Qwen.ðŸ˜‚

@firat_tuncbas__discorama_music that's True... Kimi is 1/4th size of Claude in terms of context window... But that is the only flaw according to me... When Compared kimi's memory is way Claude's memory... So it's easy to switch between new windows... It's for creative thinking, planning, reasoning and other stuff... But for coding and stuff content window size  is a major drawback in kimi....
@firat_tuncbas__discorama_music I'm using a laptop with 16 gb ram and 4 gb rtx 3050 gpu... If i did that my laptop will turn burn and turn into ashes ðŸ˜‚ðŸ˜‚
